Email verification has no retry queue. Transient SMTP failures (~1-2%) leave users stuck at signup.

CRITICAL — actively broken in production. 4 lookups still query users/ directly: SitterDataFetcher, BookingDetailViewModel, ChatViewModelDisplayName (x2), RecurringBookingService. Shows 'Unable to load sitters' + 'User {uid}' bugs. Root cause: firestore.rules commit 67bc1b4 removed petSitter read exception — owners can no longer read users/{sitterId}. iOS reference: commit d62aeb6e5. Fix: replace all 4 with publicProfiles lookups. List query needs both bizId and role constraints.

firestore.rules: removed sameBizId() from isAdmin() list condition. sameBizId() references resource.data.bizId which Firestore denies without a matching query constraint — was breaking ALL web-admin user queries. Deploy: firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
GPSConsentService.kt + GPSConsentSheet code complete. Runtime device verification not done. visitTracking writes are blocked without consent (Firestore rule: commit d5fec7e).

syncPublicProfile trigger doesn't sync directMessaging.allowOwnerChats. iOS defaults to true if absent — safe but silent divergence if sitter disables messaging. LOW priority.

Already fixed in code — getSitterName() called at lines 58, 242; sitterName written at lines 71, 110, 254, 343. Verified code reads match. Cross-repo TODO was stale.

Single admin booking (createAdminBooking) now derives + writes scheduledTime string ("h:mm a" via toLocaleTimeString en-US) so iOS BookingCardInline.swift:20 shows the time instead of 'at '. Verified: pets already stored as names (extractPetNames) — empty avatars in repro = admin didn't pick pets, not a bug. serviceType slug IS the correct architecture — iOS must map it (see IOS-BOOKING-CARD-SLUG). tsc -b passes.

SUPERSEDED by SERVICENAME-SPLIT schema. Admin bookings render raw serviceType slug ('dog-walking') as card title — BookingCardInline.swift:16 prints booking.serviceType verbatim. Fix: (1) WRITE — store catalog SLUG in serviceType + snapshot catalog name into new serviceName field at booking create (BookingCRUDService.swift:43, catalog BookingModels.swift:96); (2) READ — render serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType), idempotent resolver handles all legacy doc classes without migration. Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md. Full detail in CROSS_REPO_TODOS.md.

Schema split serviceType (machine key/slug) + serviceName (frozen display snapshot). web-admin writes both on create (booking, recurring series, recurring bookings, visits/{id}); reads via resolveServiceName(booking) helper at all display sites (table, drawer, daysheet, calendar, list, timeline, my-schedule, invoices summary + modal line items). Design doc: docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md. tsc -b clean, 427 tests pass.

Mirror serviceType+serviceName split. WRITE: slug to serviceType + snapshot catalog name to serviceName at booking create (FirebaseBookingRepository.createBooking, RecurringSeriesRepositoryImpl). READ: serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType) at all booking display sites. Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md.

(1) Document serviceType+serviceName split in PLATFORM_ARCHITECTURE.md + contracts.md; field rule: serviceName immutable after create (frozen snapshot). Dirty analytics = sales problem, required. (3) Square/invoice line-item descriptions must read serviceName ?? humanize(serviceType). Design: savipets-web-admin/docs/architecture/SERVICE_NAMING.md.

AdminBookingService.createAdminBooking now calls httpsCallable<>(functions,'createBooking') instead of direct setDoc; sends serviceId/pets/scheduledDate(epoch ms)/paymentMethod/clientId/sitterId?/specialInstructions?/address(flattened string)?/duration/timeZoneIdentifier/idempotencyKey(crypto.randomUUID)/adminPriceOverride/isComp?. Found during web-admin Phase 3 (WEBADMIN-CATALOG-CALLABLE). createBooking callable buildBookingDoc denormalizes clientName but NOT sitterName -- only sets sitterId. Pre-callable web-admin wrote booking.sitterName (and visit.sitterName) via getSitterName(). Now admin bookings with an assigned sitter will have sitterId but empty/absent sitterName on BOTH the booking doc and the visit doc. Web-admin read sites use sitterName (TimelineView, PayReportsSummary, RecurringVisitPreview, etc.) and cannot backfill (TODO forbids updateDoc on callable-authored docs). FIX: in createBooking, when sitterId present, read users/{sitterId} (or publicProfiles) name and denormalize sitterName onto both booking + visit docs, same as clientName. Deploy: firebase deploy --only functions:createBooking.

Found during web-admin Phase 3. createBookingSchema PAYMENT_METHODS = [CASH,CHECK,CARD,Unknown]. Web-admin form offers 'invoice' as a first-class payment method but the callable has no INVOICE value -- web-admin currently maps invoice->Unknown (interim, lossy: invoice semantics + skipPaymentValidation intent erased). FIX: add 'INVOICE' to PAYMENT_METHODS and handle it (likely skipPaymentValidation=true, paymentStatus=pending until invoice paid). Then update web-admin mapPaymentMethod invoice->INVOICE. Deploy: firebase deploy --only functions:createBooking.
